# komodo_user_group_membership (Resource)

Manages a single user's membership in a Komodo user group.

~> **Note:** Do not use this resource alongside `komodo_user_group` with a `users` list for the same group. Managing the same membership from both resources will cause conflicts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_user_group_membership" "example" {
  user_group = komodo_user_group.example.id
  user       = komodo_user.alice.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user` (String) The username or ID of the user to add to the group.
- `user_group` (String) The name or ID of the user group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The resource ID, formatted as `{user_group}/{user}`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using the format: {user_group_id}/{user_id}
terraform import komodo_user_group_membership.example 6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8/6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7b9
```
